changeSet.author: microfina-phase11
changeSet.comment: Insert Phase 11.2 privileges into the Privilege table (idempotent — each row is guarded by IF NOT EXISTS)
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_BANK') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_BANK', 'Gérer les banques et comptes bancaires', 'BANQUE', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_SAVINGS') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_SAVINGS', 'Gérer les comptes épargne', 'EPARGNE', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_CHEQUE') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_CHEQUE', 'Gérer les carnets de chèques', 'BANQUE', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_CASH') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_CASH', 'Gérer les opérations de caisse', 'CAISSE', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_BUDGET') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_BUDGET', 'Gérer les budgets', 'BUDGET', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'VIEW_AUDIT') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('VIEW_AUDIT', 'Consulter le journal d''audit', 'SECURITE', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_PARAMS') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_PARAMS', 'Gérer les paramètres système', 'ADMIN', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'BACKUP_DB') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('BACKUP_DB', 'Effectuer des sauvegardes de la base de données', 'ADMIN', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'MANAGE_BANK_OP') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('MANAGE_BANK_OP', 'Valider les opérations bancaires', 'BANQUE', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'RESTORE_DB') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('RESTORE_DB', 'Restaurer la base de données', 'ADMIN', 0)

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege IN ( 'MANAGE_BANK', 'MANAGE_SAVINGS', 'MANAGE_CHEQUE', 'MANAGE_CASH', 'MANAGE_BUDGET', 'VIEW_AUDIT', 'MANAGE_PARAMS', 'BACKUP_DB', 'MANAGE_BANK_OP', 'RESTORE_DB' )
